web.description: Come home to a sanctuary above Miami—soaring penthouse residences with iconic views of the Miami River and city skyline, defined by impeccable design, ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://loftybrickell.com/#content)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/dressing.jpg?fit=199%2C261&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/exterior-tower-1.jpg?fit=199%2C261&quality=89&ssl=1)

# PENTHOUSE COLLECTION

###### HIGH DESIGN. IMPECCABLE SERVICE. TOTAL FLEXIBILITY.

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/man-on-balcony-1.jpg?fit=400%2C525&quality=89&ssl=1)

###### Designed by INC

###### Furnished by ARTEFACTO

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/man-on-balcony-1.jpg?fit=400%2C525&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/night-exterior-balcony.jpg?fit=1920%2C1129&quality=89&ssl=1)

## THE PENTHOUSE COLLECTION

LOFTY Brickell redefines urban luxury as the first and only Brickell tower designed and licensed for short-term rentals, with every residence finished to perfection and styled by Artefacto.

Come home to a sanctuary above Miami—soaring penthouse residences with iconic views of the Miami River and city skyline, defined by impeccable design, world-class amenities, and bespoke personal service. Set in Miami’s most prestigious residential epicenter—inspired by the sensibility of a luxury hotel, with unmatched attention to detail, exquisitely curated interiors by globally renowned Artefacto design by INC, and gold-standard hospitality—The LOFTY Penthouse Collection brings the best of all worlds to Brickell.

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/interior-slide-3.jpg?fit=1557%2C878&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/interior-slide-1.jpg?fit=1557%2C878&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/interior-slide-2.jpg?fit=1557%2C878&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/interior-slide-3.jpg?fit=1557%2C878&quality=89&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/interior-slide-1.jpg?fit=1557%2C878&quality=89&ssl=1)

## Designed by INC furnished by artefacto

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/collage.png?fit=727%2C716&quality=80&ssl=1)

### “We are taking the highest floors with the best views and delivering a singular Artefacto lifestyle for a select group of buyers who will be surrounded by style, energy, and scenery in every direction. These are next-generation dream homes to be enjoyed and shared.”

## — Paulo Bacchi, CEO of Artefacto

## Exclusivity on demand tailored to you

###### Penthouse OWNER’s Exclusive Benefits

PH Concierge Lounge exclusively for Penthouse residents

Exclusive Penthouse Amenity Floor

Complete Furniture Package by ARTEFACTO

Art Package included for Residences

[Download PENTHOUSE Factsheet](https://loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/LOFTY-mini-brochure.pdf)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/waterfront.jpg?fit=644%2C881&quality=89&ssl=1)

###### The Brickell WaterFront

Miami’s most exclusive location—a vibrant yachting scene and a social, lively waterfront, with views of the city and sea everywhere you turn.

[EXPLORE THE LOCATION](https://loftybrickell.com/location/)

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/riverfront-patio-1.jpg?fit=571%2C386&quality=89&ssl=1)

###### Avra Estiatorio

Home to Avra Estiatorio, iconic, five-star Mediterranean restaurant, featuring a 300-seat riverfront dining room and stunning water views.

## Your sanctuary above the skyline

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/night-interior.jpg?fit=1920%2C1129&quality=89&ssl=1)

## THE LOFTY LIFE

LOFTY is about moving freely through the world, creating your own definition of home, taking in new experiences from a place that’s already familiar.

![](https://i0.wp.com/loftybrickell.com/wp-content/uploads/city-overlook-video-poster.jpg?fit=1402%2C790&quality=89&ssl=1)

[EXPLORE THE PENTHOUSE COLLECTION](https://loftybrickell.com/penthouses/)

reCAPTCHA

web.title: Lofty Residences Brickell Miami | Prices & Floor Plans
web.description: Lofty Brickell Residences is a luxury real estate development in Miami, Florida, featuring 43 stories with spacious studios, one and two bedroom residences.
web.markdown:
![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=ecad987d)

A NEW STANDARD OF

COSMOPOLITAN LIVING IN

BRICKELL

[En español](https://es.loftybrickell.miami/)

[⬆︎](https://loftybrickell.miami/#gototop)

[![#home](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image14.png?v=ecad987d)](https://loftybrickell.miami/#home)

44 Stories / 784 Residences of Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

## SLEEK DESIGN, A CENTRAL LOCATION IN WONDERFUL BRICKELL FLORIDA, AND AMENITIES THAT CATER ALL OF YOUR NEEDS.

The famous firm Arquitectonica designed the tower in an amazing minimalist post modern aesthetic. Lofty Residences Brickell has dramatic views of the Miami River and the Miami and Brickell skyline.Arquitectonica is the mastermind behind Reach and Rise at Brickell City Centre, and Icon Bay and many more spectacular buildings in the area.

**[Residences](https://loftybrickell.miami/#residences)**

**[Floor Plans](https://loftybrickell.miami/#floorplans)**

**[Amenities](https://loftybrickell.miami/#amenities)**

**[Latest News](https://loftybrickell.miami/#news)**

**[Location](https://loftybrickell.miami/#location)**

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://loftybrickell.miami/#prices)**

**[Contact Us](https://loftybrickell.miami/#contact)**

LOFTY IS UNDER CONSTRUCTION. DELIVERY 2027

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=ecad987d)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image12.jpg?v=ecad987d)

### 44 Stories / 784 Residences of Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

## The Residences

Lofty Residences Brickell’s perfect location allows residents to live just minutes away from several cultural attractions, arts, restaurants, luxury shopping, parks, and so much more.

Click the photos below for more details

- [![Contemporary Living Room](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/17b94bdf_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![City Views](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/0536767a_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Elegant Kitchens](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/03ca0c18_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Finished Master Bedrooms](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/bc6bd20c_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Modern Bathrooms with Stone Countertops](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/968cafcc_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Owner closets in every residence](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/91e008b1.jpg?v=ecad987d)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/91e008b1_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![High ceilings ranging from 9’ to 11’](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/a46875a1_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Private balconies](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery03/ecae15e3_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=ecad987d)

## Penthouse Collection by Artefacto

A select series of exclusive residences, crafted in partnership with the esteemed design firm Artefacto and a group of internationally acclaimed designers, architects, and artists. The collaboration between Artefacto and LOFTY embodies the refined values of both brands, seamlessly merging to produce a rare collection of penthouses that embody the pinnacle of luxury living.

Features: Signature sand benches, modern, open layouts from 997 SF to 1859 SF, two- to three-bedroom + den residences, panoramic Miami River and skyline views, private balconies, 10-ft. ceilings, owner closets in every residence, floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors

with sound attenuating, impact-resistant laminated glass throughout, individually controlled, energy-efficient central air conditioning and heating system, all residences are delivered fully finished and specially curated by Artefacto

Click the photos below for more details

- [![Dining Room](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery02/d992b604_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)
- [![Kitchen](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/gallery02/a9a10ef1_original.jpg?v=ecad987d)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image09.jpg?v=ecad987d)

## Lofty Residences Brickell

\- Urban luxury residences with modern open layouts from 485SF — 930 SF\- All residences are delivered fully finished and furnished specially curated by INC.\- Panoramic Miami River and Miami skyline views\- Private balconies in every residence\- Corner units offer wrap-around balconies\- High ceilings ranging from 9’ to 11’

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://loftybrickell.miami/#prices)**

**[Floor Plans](https://loftybrickell.miami/#floorplans)**

**[Location](https://loftybrickell.miami/#location)**

**[Contact Us](https://loftybrickell.miami/#contact)**

### Spectacular Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

\- Short-term rentals

\- 2 Story lobby with floor to ceiling windows

\- 24-hour concierge

\- 24- hour valet parking

\- Advanced technology smart-building

\- Exclusive LOFTY app

\- Cutting-edge green building technology

\- 6 High-speed passenger elevators with access control

\- On-site hospitality management

\- Curated River-front restaurant with outdoor dining terrace

\- Exotic resort pool with pool-side cabanas

\- Bar and grill on pool deck 24/7

\- Co-working lounge

\- Private meeting rooms

\- Event room with exclusive terrace

\- Fully-equipped, state-of-the-art fitness center with HD TVs and wireless audio

\- Private Peloton studios

\- Yoga lounge and terrace

\- LOFTY Rooftop Experience

Click the photos for more details

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image03.jpg?v=ecad987d)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=ecad987d)

### Lofty Residences Brickell’s perfect location allows residents to live just steps away from several cultural attractions, arts, restaurants, luxury shopping, parks, water and so much more.Since the 2000s, Brickell has become an area not only for commercial space and offices, but also for luxury homes, with a residential real estate boom that promoted the concept of “Live, work and Play” as it had never happened before.. this is the new Manhattan.

## MAP AND LOCATION

Building Address:

[99 SW 7th St, Miami, FL 33130](https://www.google.com/maps/place/99+SW+7th+St,+Miami,+FL+33130,+EE.+UU./@25.7674902,-80.1975193,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x88d9b684dd5e5705:0x9054d80fb93c88c8!8m2!3d25.7674854!4d-80.1953306?coh=164777&entry=tt&shorturl=1)

\- Brickell City Centre: 1 minute’ walk\- Downtown: 5 minutes’ walk\- Wynwood: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive\- Key Biscayne: 15 minutes’ drive

### LATest NEWS

## The Standard Brickell & Lofty have secured funding to complete construction.

Both projects have received a second capital injection of $513 million to complete construction and deliver these two fantastic towers by the end of 2027. We still have inventory in both towers, this is a great opportunity.Updated 10/02/2025

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image13.jpg?v=ecad987d)

## Live camera

[![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image16.jpg?v=ecad987d)](https://share.earthcam.net/tJ90CoLmq7TzrY396Yd88GDPuoDKkN_BCOQXzI3vb2E!/lofty_brickell/camera/live)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image15.jpg?v=ecad987d)

## THE TEAM

**DEVELOPERS**

NEWGARD DEVELOPMENT GROUP**ARCHITECT**

ARQUITECTONICA**INTERIOR DESIGN**

INC

## Newgard

Newgard is one of the leading real estate development companies in Florida, offering unique and progressive concepts into the world of development and architecture. The firm has successfully managed and developed projects ranging from $2 Million dollars to upwards of $250 Million primarily in Florida, Texas and Tennessee markets. Another one of their prestigious investments is Centro in Downtown.

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=ecad987d)

![](https://loftybrickell.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=ecad987d)

### STUDIOS, 1 AND 2 BEDROOMS SOLD OUT, PENTHOUSES AVAILABLE FOR SALE FROM 2M
